---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for SPARKY
title: "[Feature]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ahansardar

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I am frustrated when..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions, workarounds, or features you have considered.

## Feature area

- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Voice input / microphone
- [ ] Wake word
- [ ] TTS / audio output
- [ ] Actions / automation
- [ ] Browser automation
- [ ] PDF summarization
- [ ] Memory
- [ ] Updater / installer
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Other

## Proposed user flow

If applicable, describe how a user would trigger and use this feature step by step.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, references, or examples here.
